overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the neon-lit streets of Night City at night. The character moves along sidewalks and streets beneath elevated highways, passing holographic billboards, neon storefronts, and futuristic buildings in a dense urban cyberpunk environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beneath elevated highway with commercial buildings

events.description: character briefly crouches while continuing to move forward along the railing
approaching the KIROSHI clinic area with prominent pink neon signage becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing by a large building with red warning lights on the roof

entered.detail: large concrete elevated highway ramp running parallel to the sidewalk
multi-story building with distinctive red warning lights on the roof
yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on the street
metal and concrete safety railing along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk beneath an elevated highway structure in a neon-lit cyberpunk city. The environment features a large building with red roof lights on the left and yellow crosswalk markings ahead. The atmosphere is hazy with scattered pedestrians visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street corner with neon storefronts and Japanese signage

events.description: passing directly beneath the prominent pink KIROSHI eye implant clinic sign
turning the corner at Moore street with new storefronts coming into view

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection, passing the KIROSHI clinic and continuing along the sidewalk past various neon-lit shops and traditional paper lanterns

entered.detail: large circular pink neon sign with Japanese text for the KIROSHI eye implant clinic
street sign with white text on black background indicating Moore street
vertical pink neon sign reading HOTEL in capital letters
Japanese style paper lanterns hanging outside a storefront

segments.scene_description: The character passes beneath the iconic KIROSHI clinic sign and turns right at Moore street. The scene features dense neon signage including a pink HOTEL sign and traditional Japanese paper lanterns. The elevated highway now passes overhead as the character moves through the commercial corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level intersection beneath highway overpasses with towering billboards

events.description: moving through the intersection area beneath multiple levels of highway infrastructure
entering a wider street canyon with massive vertical holographic billboards visible ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing through the intersection beneath multiple levels of highway overpasses, surrounded by towering holographic advertisements and neon-lit buildings

entered.detail: massive vertical digital billboards displaying advertisements on the sides of skyscrapers
small red building or kiosk with windows at street level
tall skyscrapers covered in vertical neon lighting and signage
wide billboard spanning across the street displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a wide intersection beneath multiple highway overpasses. Massive holographic billboards cover the surrounding skyscrapers, creating a canyon of neon light. A small red kiosk structure stands on the right as the character crosses the asphalt street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with dense signage and moderate vehicle traffic

events.description: black car passes by on the left side of the street
continuing straight down the street alongside moving traffic

agents.ego_description: walking down the street alongside passing vehicles, passing various storefronts and large vertical billboards on both sides

notable_agents.action: black car driving past on the street to the left, moving in the same direction

entered.detail: black sedan driving along the street with headlights on
ground level shops with illuminated windows and signage
external air conditioning units mounted on the building facade
bright digital advertisement screens at building level

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a commercial street with moderate vehicle traffic, including a black car passing on the left. The street is lined with storefronts, air conditioning units, and large digital billboards. The tall holographic towers remain visible in the distance to the left as the character continues through the neon-lit urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a hazy urban corridor that transitions from a stark industrial underpass into a vibrant, neon-saturated commercial district. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath the heavy shadow of an elevated highway, passing a large building marked by red roof lights and yellow crosswalks. As the character advances, the atmosphere shifts from the open gray of the highway structure toward the dense glow of the city's signage. The scene then opens up as the camera passes beneath a prominent KIROSHI clinic sign and turns right at Moore Street, where the lighting transforms into a kaleidoscope of pink hotel signs and traditional Japanese paper lanterns. Finally, the movement settles into the heart of the commercial corner, with the elevated highway remaining as a looming canopy over the brightly lit street.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cavernous intersection beneath highway overpasses into a bustling commercial street. It begins with the character crossing an asphalt road beneath a canyon of neon light, where massive holographic billboards tower over the surrounding skyscrapers and a small red kiosk stands to the right. As the character moves forward, the oppressive scale of the overpasses gives way to a more open urban corridor lined with storefronts and air conditioning units. The scene then shifts toward a steady flow of vehicle traffic, including a black car passing on the left, while the distant holographic towers remain visible against the night sky.
